reasoning: Emotional (60%): Cotton-candy pink orb top, warm brown staff shaft, and rainbow bead accents hit the bright/warm/charming Hyrule mood squarely. Staff shaft and bead segments are pixel-grid-snapped with hard 2-tone shading. Matches Denzi-tier hard-pixel discipline on outlines and palette discipline. Score ~8/10. Weighted: 0.6×9 + 0.4×8 = 8.6 → 9.
